title: Allen Career Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Allen Career Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Subject Matter Expert in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
